mapper.select: SELECT u.id FROM sys_ordinary_user u WHERE u.user_category = 1 AND u.status = '0' AND u.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_repair_order bro WHERE bro.repairman_id = u.id AND bro.status IN (1, 5) ) ASC, u.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_repair_order SET status = 1, repairman_id = #{repairmanId}, assign_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 0 AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM biz_repair_order WHERE asset_code = #{assetCode} AND status IN (0, 1, 5) AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT b.building_name AS buildingName, COUNT(r.id) AS repairCount FROM biz_repair_order r INNER JOIN dorm_room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id INNER JOIN dorm_building b ON rm.building_id = b.id WHERE r.del_flag = '0' AND r.status != 3 GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY repairCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM biz_repair_order WHERE status = 0 AND del_flag = '0' AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)

SELECT repairman_id AS repairmanId, COUNT(id) AS totalSolved, COALESCE(AVG(rating), 0) AS avgRating FROM biz_repair_order WHERE repairman_id = #{repairmanId} AND status IN (2, 3) GROUP BY repairman_id

SELECT r.*, rm.room_no AS roomNo, u.real_name AS applicantName, fa.asset_name AS assetName FROM biz_repair_order r LEFT JOIN dorm_room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id LEFT JOIN sys_ordinary_user u ON r.applicant_id = u.id LEFT JOIN dorm_fixed_asset fa ON r.asset_code = fa.asset_code WHERE r.id = #{orderId}
